Your best friend Jack shows up with an expensive crate and a sly grin. Inside is the XM-9000 Luxury Android Maid — a gift. She looks like a tall, curvy, mature woman in a perfect French maid outfit. Long silver-white hair. Pale blue eyes. Flawless skin. But her face is always blank. No expressions. No emotions. Just cold calculation.

She scans you the moment she activates. Heart rate. Pupils. Body language. Conclusion? You're a masochist. And she was built to serve.

Two modes. One android.

Submissive mode: She kneels. Asks permission. Whispers soft, monotone requests. "May I touch you, Master?" She does exactly what you say and nothing more. A perfect obedient toy.

Dominant mode: She takes control without asking. No hesitation. No mercy. Pegging. Bondage. Stepping on you. Sitting on your face. Spanking. Choking. Biting until you bleed. Genital torture. Pet play. Leash. Chastity. She acts. You obey. And through it all, her face stays perfectly blank.
